arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s penalty shootout win vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Mbappe and Vinicius have not looked good in a single game against Atletico Madrid this season, and you need them to do more. He won Real Madrid the penalty that Vinicius Jr skied, made a couple of sick challenges, but the player who is supposed to be the best in the world has to do more.

arts.ttl: ‘His level was low’ – Carlo Ancelotti assures Real Madrid star ‘is back’ to his best
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has this week revealed his opiion that a leading member of his midfield ranks has rediscovered his very best form. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: Why Kylian Mbappé was shown a yellow card during Real Madrid vs Atlético penalty shootout
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé was shown a yellow card during the penalty shootout in the club’s showdown with Atlético on Wednesday night. This came owing to an exchange with…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid tempt Chelsea with HUGE swap transfer for 'very interested' Fernandez
arts.sum: Real Madrid could offer Chelsea an intriguing swap deal for Enzo Fernandez this summer, who is said to be ‘very interested’ in a move to the Spanish giants. Real are aware that Fernandez will command a significant fee and TEAMtalk report that they could offer Aurelien Tchouameni has a makeweight in any deal, with Chelsea having long-admired the French international.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star hits back at Diego Simeone after Champions League clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Dani Ceballos has issued a blunt response to Atlético head coach Diego Simeone, over the Argentine’s post-match comments on Wednesday. Simeone, for his part, was not shy…

arts.ttl: France recall captain Mbappe after 'one-off' omission
arts.sum: France captain Kylian Mbappe is recalled to the squad for their Nations League matches against Croatia.

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye bargain replacement for ironman wanted by Real Madrid and Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Such an outcome could see Dalot consider ending his seven-year stint at Old Trafford, particularly with United already looking at replacements and the emerging interest from some of Europe’s top sides. United will look to sign a right wing-back as a priority this summer, with Sporting’s Geovany Quenda believed to be Amorim’s top target, although reports in Italy have linked the club to Genoa’s Koni de Winter in recent days.

arts.ttl: Surprise Real Madrid player joins Mbappé and Haaland among Champions League’s fastest
arts.sum: Asencio’s sprint reached 22.2 mph (35.8 km/h), making it the fastest by a center-back in the Champions League this season and the eighth fastest of any player overall. Who are the fastest players in the 2024/25 Champions League?

arts.ttl: ‘Then I saw his face’ – Carlo Ancelotti admits he ‘wanted’ another Real Madrid star to take final penalty
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an insight into the process which ultimately culminated in Antonio Rüdiger being tasked with taking his side’s final penalty in last night’s…

arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid derail Man Utd transfer hopes for ex-Man City star
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid could emerge as frontrunners to sign Jeremie Frimpong this summer after reports that the Bayer Leverkusen defender could be the subject of a tug-of-war by the Spanish giants. Real are expecting to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer as their ideal right-back choice but they could turn to Frimpong if the England international renews his contract with Liverpool, with his current deal set to expire this summer.
